mapper.select: SELECT refund_order_id FROM t_refund_order WHERE status = 'FAIL' ORDER BY applied_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT refund_order_id AS refundOrderId, payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(refund_amount, 2)) AS refundAmount, refund_method AS refundMethod, status, status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS appliedAt, CASE WHEN success_at IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(success_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS successAt FROM t_refund_order WHERE refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId}

SELECT refund_order.refund_order_id AS refundOrderId, refund_order.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, refund_order.order_no AS orderNo, refund_order.customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(refund_order.refund_amount, 2)) AS refundAmount, refund_order.refund_method AS refundMethod, refund_order.refund_reason AS refundReason, refund_order.status, refund_order.status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(refund_order.applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS appliedAt, CASE WHEN refund_order.success_at IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(refund_order.success_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS successAt, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(payment_order.amount, 2)) AS paidAmount, payment_order.payment_method AS paymentMethod, payment_order.status AS paymentStatus FROM t_refund_order refund_order INNER JOIN t_payment_order payment_order ON payment_order.payment_order_id = refund_order.payment_order_id WHERE refund_order.refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT log_no AS logNo, action_code AS actionCode, action_name AS actionName, from_status AS fromStatus, to_status AS toStatus, operator_name AS operatorName, operation_remark AS operationRemark, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM t_refund_operation_log WHERE refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, amount AS paidAmount, status, payment_method AS paymentMethod FROM t_payment_order WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM t_refund_order WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} AND status IN ('REVIEWING', 'PROCESSING', 'SUCCESS')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_refund_order(refund_order_id, payment_order_id, order_no, customer_name, refund_amount, refund_method, refund_reason, status, status_type, applied_at, success_at) VALUES (#{refundOrderId}, #{source.paymentOrderId}, #{source.orderNo}, #{source.customerName}, #{request.refundAmount}, #{request.refundMethod}, #{request.refundReason}, #{status}, #{statusType}, NOW(), NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE t_refund_order SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, success_at = CASE WHEN #{success} THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} = 'PROCESSING' THEN NULL ELSE success_at END WHERE refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_refund_operation_log ( log_no, refund_order_id, action_code, action_name, from_status, to_status, operator_name, operation_remark, created_at ) VALUES ( #{logNo}, #{refundOrderId}, #{actionCode}, #{actionName}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operatorName}, #{operationRemark}, NOW() )
